name: bymax-web-verify
description: Real-browser verification for web apps, powered by the `agent-browser` CLI (Vercel Labs). /bymax-web-verify:setup installs everything in one shot (CLI + Chrome for Testing) — ideal as a portable backup after a fresh macOS install. /bymax-web-verify:verify drives a real browser to confirm a change works (navigate, interact, screenshot, read console/errors). A SessionStart hook detects a missing CLI and offers to install it. Depends on `agent-browser` but never bundles it.
